title: teloxys vagans
intro: Teloxys vagans, also known as Vagante or Vagans, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Teloxys vagans has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, and is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its health benefits.
